page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re6p.26xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the ecs.re6p family. It is powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor, providing 104 dedicated physical cores with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, meaning hyperthreading is disabled. The instance features 384.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 3.69 GB of RAM per core. It operates on a KVM hypervisor and does not include local storage or integrated GPUs.

For networking, the instance provides a baseline bandwidth of 25 Gbps. Because there are no local storage drives bundled with this instance, storage must be attached externally. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures that each of the 104 vCPUs corresponds to a dedicated physical core, eliminating resource contention from multi-threading and making it highly suitable for workloads requiring consistent, predictable compute performance.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.re6p.26xlarge offers a high density of dedicated physical cores relative to its memory footprint. This hardware profile is optimized for parallel processing tasks that benefit from dedicated CPU execution units without the overhead of hyperthreading. Appropriate workloads for this instance include high-performance computing, intensive batch processing, compute-heavy simulations, and large-scale web serving where predictable CPU performance is critical.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re6p.26xlarge is an x86_64 server instance within the ecs.re6p family, running on the KVM hypervisor. It features 104 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, ensuring no hyperthreading overhead. The instance is equipped with 384.0 GB of RAM, providing 3.69 GB of memory per core, but does not include local storage or GPUs. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 25 Gbps. With its dedicated CPU allocation and high core count, this instance is designed for workloads requiring predictable, non-shared compute resources. It is well-suited for high-performance computing, parallel batch processing, and large-scale web serving.

tagline: A high-core-density dedicated compute instance featuring one hundred and four physical cores and balanced memory for predictable parallel processing workloads.
